name: aligned-delivery
description: An agile operating + coaching skill for project/program managers and team leads. Coaches and interviews PMs; helps you lead, grow, and care for a team and manage up to stakeholders; diagnoses delivery health from sprint/Jira + DORA analytics (predictability, workload balance, fragmentation, lead/cycle time, throughput, flow efficiency, deployment frequency, change-failure rate, MTTR — even without story points); and forecasts completion dates probabilistically.
